_publications._publicationTitle: The German version of the neurofibromatosis 2 impact on quality of life questionnaire correlates with severity of depression and physician-reported disease severity.

_contextSnippet: There was a moderate correlation between the item assessing anxiety and depression within the NFTI-QOL-D and the PHQ-9 (Pearson's rho = 0.57, 95% CI 0.40–0.71).
details: Moderate correlation with NFTI-QOL-D anxiety/depression item (Pearson's rho = 0.57, 95% CI 0.40–0.71)
